data.body:
## Completion verification result: PASS

Verified every acceptance criterion and success criterion in the epic against the current repository state. The implementation is complete.

### Summary of verification

The plan-review gate epic (`src/rebar/llm/plan_review/`) is fully implemented across all required ACs:

**Layer-1 DET floor (P1–P8)** — `det_floor.py`: P1 readiness shape, P2 file/symbol resolution (8f6c oracle), P3 package existence (8f6c oracle), P4 oversize signals, P5 task-DAG validity + cycle detection, P6 AC/DD quality, P7 destructive sniff, P8 reviewability/context-budget. Polyglot, fail-open (abstain on unsupported/crash/timeout), blocking only on P1/P5-cycle/P8.

**Layer-2 advisory criteria** — `registry.py` + `passes.py` + `criteria_routing.json`: all F/E/G/A criteria + triggered T1–T12 overlays + COH + ISF implemented as contract-bearing prompts in the prompt library. Proportionate scrutiny via `applies_at`. 32 criteria in the canonical set.

**Three-pass verdict model** — `passes.py`: Pass-1 emits `{finding, criteria[], evidence[], scenarios[], impact}` with no severity/confidence; Pass-2 separate verifier emits severity attributes + typed binary sub-answers `{yes|no|insufficient}`; Pass-3 deterministic decision (validity = graded fraction, impact = ordinal-mapped mean, priority = validity × impact, block|advisory|dropped).

**Budget cap, checkpointing, centrality** — `sizing.py` + `orchestrator.py`: per-plan budget cap (`REBAR_PLAN_REVIEW_BUDGET`, configurable), `shed_to_budget` sheds lowest-priority AGENT/overlay criteria first → INDETERMINATE, chunk-atomic checkpointing (`load_checkpoint`/`save_checkpoint`, keyed by material fingerprint), centrality/blast-radius computed at plan time from ticket graph.

**Pass-4 coach** — `orchestrator.py` + `passes.py`: move registry (1–9, 11, 12; id 10 intentionally absent/reserved noted), locked templates, `_validate_subject` C1 enforcement (≤8 words/≤60 chars; rejects code/imperatives), project-extensible via `.rebar/plan_review_moves.json`.

**Advisory cap** — `orchestrator.py`: top-N by priority (default 10), overflow → sidecar; blocking findings EXEMPT from cap.

**Attestation** — `attest.py`: HMAC-SHA256 signing reusing close-gate machinery, material fingerprint binding, invalidation on material edit, coverage record. Fast claim-gate check (`claim_gate_check`): pure local HMAC verify + fingerprint recompute, no LLM/network.

**Claim integration** — `transition.py` + `_plan_review_precheck`: fast signed-attestation check, `--force`+justification bypass logged as `FORCE_CLAIM` comment, bugs/session_logs exempt.

**REVIEW_RESULT sidecar** — `sidecar.py`: reducer-ignored (`_NON_REPLAY_KNOWN_TYPES`), fsck-recognised, per-finding fingerprints + decisions + verification attributes + metrics, retention-bounded (`prune`).

**Config** — `config.py`: `verify.require_plan_review_for_claim` defaults `False` ("turning it off is the rollback").

**Tests** — `tests/interfaces/lifecycle/test_plan_review_gate.py` + `tests/unit/test_plan_review.py`: gate-off default, gate-on blocks, review→claim loop, --force override+logging, material-edit invalidation, bug exemption, DET-floor block→no-signature, REVIEW_RESULT reducer-ignored, no-LLM on claim path (structural), sidecar prune, fail-open on unavailable LLM (`test_review_fail_open_on_unavailable_llm`), cap-hit INDETERMINATE budget shedding (`test_review_cap_hit_indeterminate`), per-tool fail-open for crash/timeout/no-server/unsupported-lang (`test_p2_p3_fail_open_per_tool` parametrized), Pass-3 deterministic math, registry coverage guard, subject validator, checkpointing, centrality.

**Eval suite** — `src/rebar/llm/eval_specs/`: plan-review-finder, plan-review-verifier, plan-review-isf-finder eval specs wired into the Inspect-AI eval seam; recall + false-fire + discrimination pairs from DSO/snap/rebar corpuses; human-adjudicated gold_set; T12 discrimination pair.

**Docs** — `docs/plan-review-gate.md`: gate operation, config surface, fail-open behavior, cert semantics, CI-check pattern, honest end-to-end time (including review latency), Pass-4 coach, Pass-3 math table.

Note: The prior completion-verification comment in this ticket reported several gaps (missing budget-cap/checkpointing/centrality in orchestrator, missing cap-hit INDETERMINATE test, missing fail-open-on-unsupported-stack test). All of these have since been addressed in the current repository — `sizing.py` implements the budget/checkpoint/centrality cluster and is wired into the orchestrator, and both tests exist at `test_plan_review_gate.py:227` and `:246`.

**Verdict: PASS — all acceptance and success criteria are met.**
